mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce the discount rate for future corporate earnings, mechanically lifting equity valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or positive 20-day forward returns occur in less than 50% of rate-decline periods.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid deterioration in the unemployment rate signals an abrupt labor market contraction that triggers recession risk premia, causing immediate negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day forward returns in more than 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike.

mechanism_narrative: The joint occurrence of decelerating retail sales and accelerating consumer price inflation creates a stagflationary signal that compresses profit margins and forces equity deleveraging, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The interaction term yields a statistically insignificant coefficient (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample walk-forward regressions over a 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained expansion in industrial production reflects robust manufacturing output and supply chain normalization, which supports corporate revenue growth and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in more than 55% of periods where INDPRO increases by greater than 1% month-over-month.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly real GDP growth directly correlates with aggregate corporate profit expansion, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as markets price in improved earnings fundamentals.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.02 across all rolling 2-year windows, and positive returns occur in less than 45% of high-GDP quarters.

mechanism_narrative: When consumer price inflation exceeds the 275.0 threshold while policy rates remain near zero, markets anticipate aggressive central bank tightening that compresses equity multiples, yielding negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are positive in more than 65% of periods meeting the threshold condition.

mechanism_narrative: The simultaneous increase in total nonfarm payrolls and decrease in the unemployment rate confirms a broad-based labor market recovery that boosts consumer spending expectations and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to produce a positive Rank IC greater than 0.04 in walk-forward testing, or returns are negative in more than 50% of co-occurring periods.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating housing starts signal renewed confidence in household balance sheets and construction sector activity, which transmits to broader equity markets and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in more than 60% of months where HOUST increases by greater than 5% year-over-year.
